title: Speedrunners highlight (Buried treasure)
description: Optimal items for speed running are highlighted.
body:
This resource pack assists speed runners via highlighting in red the optimal items.

TNT, Gold ingots, Iron ingots, cooked salmon and cooked cod are all highlighted in a obvious red so it is clear what items to take and which wont help you.

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it:
zwhseton@gmail.com
